Timeline management and layout functionality for Pebble firmware, including actions, events, and resources.


## Files
- **[actions_endpoint.c](actions_endpoint.c.md)**: Implements the timeline action endpoint for invoking and handling action responses in Pebble firmware.
- **[actions_endpoint.h](actions_endpoint.h.md)**: Functions for invoking actions on a phone and handling messages in the timeline action endpoint.
